project.name: TapDev Studio UI 设计
project.designRead: Developer IDE / game developers / industrial utilitarian dark theme / high density / avoid generic blue-purple
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Developer tool IDE, dark surface system with orange accent, monospace code elements, compact information-dense panels, industrial/utilitarian tone.

pages.title: 工作台
pages.visualNorthStar: IDE welcome screen with quick-action cards and project status
pages.soulElement: Quick action cards with orange icon accents on dark surface, creating a command-center feel

continuityAnchors.sidebar: Dark sidebar with orange logo mark, nav items with active orange highlight
continuityAnchors.header: Compact top bar with platform badge and project indicator
continuityAnchors.surfaceSystem: Layered dark surfaces (surface-0/1/2) with subtle borders

pages.title: 编辑器
pages.visualNorthStar: VS Code-like code editor with file tree and tab bar
pages.compositionPattern: three-panel layout (file tree | tab bar + editor | status bar)
pages.soulElement: Monaco-style dark editor with syntax-highlighted code, orange tab indicator, and file tree with folder icons

continuityAnchors.sidebar: Dark sidebar with orange logo mark, nav items with active orange highlight
continuityAnchors.header: Compact top bar with platform badge and project indicator
continuityAnchors.surfaceSystem: Layered dark surfaces (surface-0/1/2) with subtle borders

pages.title: 调试
pages.visualNorthStar: Debug console with server status and QR code for device testing
pages.compositionPattern: sidebar-shell + tabbed content area with console/server/breakpoints
pages.soulElement: Terminal-style console log with color-coded severity levels and QR code for real-device debugging

continuityAnchors.sidebar: Dark sidebar with orange logo mark, nav items with active orange highlight
continuityAnchors.header: Compact top bar with platform badge and project indicator
continuityAnchors.surfaceSystem: Layered dark surfaces (surface-0/1/2) with subtle borders

pages.title: 监控
pages.visualNorthStar: Performance dashboard with real-time metrics cards and SVG charts
pages.compositionPattern: sidebar-shell + metrics grid + chart cards + request table
pages.soulElement: Six metric cards with status-colored borders, SVG sparkline charts in orange/indigo, and a live network request table

continuityAnchors.sidebar: Dark sidebar with orange logo mark, nav items with active orange highlight
continuityAnchors.header: Compact top bar with platform badge and project indicator
continuityAnchors.surfaceSystem: Layered dark surfaces (surface-0/1/2) with subtle borders

pages.title: 构建
pages.visualNorthStar: Build configuration panel with platform selection and progress tracking
pages.compositionPattern: sidebar-shell + two-column config layout + build history
pages.soulElement: Platform selection cards with orange active border, progress bar during build, and Unity environment detection panel

continuityAnchors.sidebar: Dark sidebar with orange logo mark, nav items with active orange highlight
continuityAnchors.header: Compact top bar with platform badge and project indicator
continuityAnchors.surfaceSystem: Layered dark surfaces (surface-0/1/2) with subtle borders

pages.title: 文档
pages.visualNorthStar: In-app documentation reader with sidebar navigation and search
pages.compositionPattern: sidebar-shell + doc sidebar with categories + article content area
pages.soulElement: Search-focused doc sidebar with category pills, clean article typography on dark background with orange link accents

continuityAnchors.sidebar: Dark sidebar with orange logo mark, nav items with active orange highlight
continuityAnchors.header: Compact top bar with platform badge and project indicator
continuityAnchors.surfaceSystem: Layered dark surfaces (surface-0/1/2) with subtle borders

pages.title: 插件
pages.visualNorthStar: Plugin marketplace with command palette and development guide
pages.soulElement: Plugin cards with icon badges and hook tags, command palette with keyboard shortcut badges

continuityAnchors.sidebar: Dark sidebar with orange logo mark, nav items with active orange highlight
continuityAnchors.header: Compact top bar with platform badge and project indicator
continuityAnchors.surfaceSystem: Layered dark surfaces (surface-0/1/2) with subtle borders

pages.title: 设置
pages.visualNorthStar: Settings panel with grouped sections and theme selector
pages.compositionPattern: sidebar-shell + centered settings form with grouped sections
pages.soulElement: Clean form sections with dark surface cards, orange active theme button, and compact input fields
